race.comment: JARRITO (8) was a smart winner fresh on the Kenso, then just missed at Rosehill last time. Progressive filly who can go on with it third-up from the good draw. CAPTURE ME (10) just missed here fresh last month in what has proven a very strong form reference. Has been freshened with six weeks, kept up to the mark with a trial win here. Drawn sticky but has the ability to overcome. Big threat. ENGINE ROOM (2) returns shy of a preferred trip but strips fitter for two trials and can cause a late scare if the pace is genuine. Fitzgerald's 3kg claim gets him in well. Watch for him late. STORMLAND (1) was far from his best fresh when always back. Can improve sharply with that run out of the way.
